production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM explorer: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-035-1A", **{'drops': {'shared_phone': 0.1, 'amount_7d': 0.03}, 'metric': 'precision_at_k', 'means_fraud': False}}
meets_contract = record["means_fraud"] is False
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_CAUSAL_CLAIM"
print("S35-T1-A", status)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Del instruction y hints del packet completo el contrato de S35-T1-A-E1; pista: Relaciona los campos `drops, metric, means_fraud` con la regla explicada en S35-T1-A..
Según theory/starter del slim_packet en S35-T1-A-E2, dejo la salida contractual. Hint: Primero se calcula `missing`; ningún acceso a drops debe ocurrir antes de esa rama..
Exploro el fixture sintético de S35-T1-A-E3 y aplico solo el TODO/defecto del paquete. Una ausencia no equivale a breach: enrútala a `REQUEST_METRIC_DROP` antes de evaluar el contenido..

exercises.code:
